# Jurkat Cells

## Summary

Jurkat cells appear in the current source as a comparison model rather than the primary system. They show the same directional response to IL-42 as primary CD8 cells, but with a weaker magnitude.

## Key Findings

- [supports] Jurkat cells showed about 15 percent reduction in granzyme B under IL-42 treatment, which was weaker than the effect in primary human CD8 cells. [[lee-2026-il42-cd8-suppression]]
- [extends] The weaker Jurkat response suggests that cell-line models may understate IL-42-mediated suppression compared with primary cells. [[lee-2026-il42-cd8-suppression]]

## Contradictions and Caveats

- Jurkat cells may not capture the full behaviour of primary CD8 T cells.

## Open Questions

- Which parts of the IL-42 response are conserved between Jurkat and primary CD8 cells?
